creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello there,

I am sorry to turn your update down, but the zlib package is part of
the Haskell Platform [1] and therefore it is only updated on each HP
release.  That way we (The FreeBSD Haskell Team) would like to
strictly comply with the specifications of the platform, and decided
to not to update the affected packages individually (not even in our
developer repository on GitHub [2]).

[1] http://hackage.haskell.org/platform/
[2] https://github.com/freebsd-haskell/
